subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Two days ago a letter was addressed unto thee, and now likewise through Shaykh Faraj [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان دو روز پیش نامه ای بشما نگاشته گشت و حال نیز بواسطه شیخ فرج
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
